column21: Swims in does a loop then swims toward transducer and school of fish
Couldn’t get the second time to show up in echoview Swims as if foraging then floats. Stationary but clear shape and movement when applicable
Swims in slowly then becomes very faint then causes some fish to move.
I don't think it is a seal but it could be a baby seal floating around fairly close to the transducer maximum size is about a meter in length
very faint but the movement and one part of the track makes me confident it is a seal foraging. Will not work on echoview
There is something that floats through the frame that is roughly seal shaped but does not move and part of the track it turns into an amorphous blob that leads me to a no
very fast swim across very close to transducer. Can't get the echoview to really make it show up because of how close it is to transducer
First track is foraging and the second one is a fast swim through.
Swims fast in and floats around barely or just not in frame but then swims out fast.
Slightly tortuous path but I don't think that it looks to be foraging
Swims in fast then floats around a bit right in the middle and then swims off the side
Multiple foraging swipes. Last time looks like 2 baby seals hitting a school of fish tough in echoview because of a lot of noise

Swims at school of fish and turns around and swims out
Many times of seal swooping in looking to be foraging
very faint but I definitely feel like based on the way it moves that it is a seal

two seals swim in same direction in a small time window

swims in, stops, then zooms out

Swims in and hits somehting then sits there and zooms out
swims in then spends a lot of time floating and swims out
comes in slow and speeds through

Swimming around like it is foraging
hits school of fish then swims away from transducer then out of frame

swims through then swims back out

a couple swim throughs and some foraging.

Lots of swimming around and in circles

Swims in and sits around for a while

hangs out not moving for a long time
second time is a lot of floating around

finishing swimming through school of fish

swim in and turn away from transducer

swims across but a little more slowly
